violations.description: Error messages are always visible and not programmatically associated with their input fields via aria-describedby. Screen readers cannot announce the error context when the field is focused.
violations.reference_fix: Name is required

violations.description: The terms checkbox has no associated <label> element. The text next to it is not programmatically linked to the checkbox input.

page_description: A job posting with an application form. Error messages exist but are not linked to inputs via aria-describedby, and the terms checkbox lacks a programmatic label association.
